resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def isPowerOfFour(self, n: int) -> bool:
        return n > 0 and n & (n - 1) == 0 and n & 0xAAAAAAAA == 0
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses bitwise operations to check if the number is a power of four. It first checks if the number is positive and if it's a power of two (by checking if it has exactly one bit set), and then checks if the set bit is at an even position (by checking if the number is even when all odd bits are set to zero).
